retained_method_evidence.selection_procedure: No winner selected; vectorbt B2/B3/B4 accelerator sweeps are retained as candidate-population evidence only, and in-sample return is never a promotion criterion.

method_fixture_evidence.scope: synthetic known-answer fixtures for PBO/CSCV and DSR arithmetic only

reason: Concrete local multiple-testing evidence is retained and synthetic PBO/DSR method fixtures now pass, but production G10 remains inactive until candidate-specific estimator integration and independent recomputation are reviewed.
effect: G10 remains NOT_RUN for production validation; this package cannot claim full production validation or strategy approval.
